nasb.text: The cubit on one side and the cubit on the other, of what is left over in the length of the curtains of the tent, shall lap over the sides of the tabernacle on one side and on the other, to cover it.

esv.text: And the extra that remains in the length of the curtains, the cubit on the one side, and the cubit on the other side, shall hang over the sides of the tabernacle, on this side and that side, to cover it.

cnv.text: 帳棚幔子多出的長度，要這邊五十公分，那邊五十公分，並且要在會幕的兩邊，遮蓋會幕。

ccb.text: 两旁余下的幔子可垂在圣幕的两边，每边长五十厘米，盖着圣幕。
